reviews.review_text:
I thought Dr Harwin was great.  Very no-nonsense, right to the point, direct approach.  Not so big on the hand-holding stuff, but that's not why I went there!  I am getting well and that was the purpose.

This is me, 7 years later!  Still doing great, and very thankful
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you so much for taking the time to leave us a review! We're thrilled to hear that your experience has been a positive one. We'll be sure to share your feedback with the team at Florida Cancer Specialists Fort Myers Cancer Center.

reviews.review_text: I could write a novel on the absolute travesty that this practice is, and the ways in which they take advantage of cancer patients who are at their mercy for life saving treatment. I will say that I love my doctor, Dr. Gaikazian. She is smart, compassionate, caring and wonderful. She is the only reason that I have stuck it out there for this long. However, FL cancer as a whole could not care less about patients, their care takers, efficiency or even accuracy. The number of times I have saved my own life there (as a registered nurse with some understanding and knowledge of medicine) is astounding. I was diagnosed with stage 3 breast cancer at the age of 32, and I have 4 small children. I have been a patient at Fl cancer for 2 years now and with another 8 years in treatment (minimum) to go, I absolutely cannot tolerate the inefficiency and lack of respect for my time or concerns as a patient and human there anymore. From miscommunications, incorrect orders, lost labs, difficult scheduling, long wait times, inability to get answers for basic questions, lack of understanding of my care by various nurses and P.A.s there, near misses with medical errors, and downright refusal to correct these issues, I have walked out of their offices in tears more times than I care to admit. I have witnessed horrifying and disgusting, unapologetic treatment of elderly patients at check in.  It is like a factory there, and you are just a number, not a person. I highly recommend that you choose a cancer center that will care for you and your family as humans and not as a customer with dollar signs behind your insurance card. This place is not it. They are too big and too corporate to truly see you individually with importance. I have given chance after chance after chance, and I am at my wits end. I do not recommend this practice at all.
reviews.owner_answer: Your feedback means a lot to our team. Thank you for taking the time to leave a review and let us know how we are doing.

reviews.review_text: The worst thing about getting treatment here is the excessive bureaucracy at this center; I still haven't been able to get the treatment I was supposed to have in January.
reviews.original_review_text: Lo peor que pueda una tratarse es mucho la burocracia que hay en este sentro aun yo no e podido hacer el tratamiento qué me debí hacer en Enero

reviews.review_text: I found the staff to be very pleasant. Have never waited for more than 30 minutes. Close to my home & plenty of parking spaces.
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you for your kind sentiments towards our care team. Your positive feedback helps others confidently choose Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute for their oncology and hematology needs.

reviews.review_text: The services are the best I have experienced.
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you so much for taking the time to leave us a review! We're thrilled to hear that your experience has been a positive one. We'll be sure to share your feedback with the team at Florida Cancer Specialists Fort Myers Cancer Center.

reviews.review_text: The people who work here are wonderful. They are caring, compassionate and make you feel confident in their ability to take care of you.
reviews.owner_answer: We are so grateful for your 5-star rating! Our team works hard to ensure every patient has a positive experience.
Thank you for the thoughtful rating. We take feedback seriously and are always looking for ways to enhance the patient experience.

reviews.review_text: Customer focused. Efficient. Set the model for other medical practices. The patient care is great. Second to none
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you for your support! We're honored to be part of your care.

reviews.review_text: I am receiving care after surgery, chemo, radiation for large cell neuroendocrine uterine cancer in Mississippi and Alabama. Dr Zafar has continued immunotherapy, CT and PET scans. I am happy with the care I have received.
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you for your support! We're honored to be part of your care.
Thank you for taking a few minutes to share your positive experience. Your review can make a significant impact on helping others confidently choose Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute.

reviews.review_text:
Check in quick
Waiting time reasonable
Nurses excellent
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute. Reviews like yours inspire others. Thank you for entrusting your care to our medical team.

reviews.review_text: Thank you all for your time, dedication, and compassionate hearts. I appreciate you for all that you've done and continue to do.
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you for your support! We're honored to be part of your care.
We appreciate you taking the time to leave an online review. Your feedback helps us improve our services and provide top-quality care to our patients.

reviews.review_text:
Dr Khan was great.  He was straight to the point and very clear.

I’m disappointed that I wasn’t given access to your portal so that I could see my test results.  I sent a request for access through your web site and got no response.
reviews.owner_answer: Thanks for the positive rating! If there’s anything we can do to improve your experience let us know, we always welcome your feedback.

reviews.review_text: Everyone working there was very nice and accomodating.  I've been going there for over 2 years and everyone is wonderful.  It means a lot to a cancer patient.
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you for your feedback. We're glad to hear you had a positive experience with our staff.
Thank you for taking a few minutes to share your positive experience. Your review can make a significant impact on helping others confidently choose Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute.

reviews.review_text: I give them 3 stars because front desk could be more friendly and show a little more compassion. People come here because they are going through something very difficult like Cancer and most of these girls at the front desk don’t even look at you or smile. My providers have always been so good I have no complaints there. The lady that took me back to do my blood work only asked me 3 questions and poked me. No small talk, no empathy or anything. I think there is a lot of room for improvement.

I always have a positive experience at Florida Cancer Specialists. I have every confidence in Dr. Romero and her assistants. This place saved my life using the best treatment plan for me. I have nothing but great things to say about Florida Cancer Specialists.
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you for your feedback. We're glad to hear that you had a positive experience during your visit and found our staff friendly and professional.

reviews.review_text: Everyone is always friendly.
Dr. Rodriguez was very kind,knowledgeable. The nurses were also kind,knowledgeable,professioal,i felt very comfortable,injection didn't even hurt.
Dr. Soori is always very thorough in explaining my Health. He is always very friendly too.
The doctor and the staff were all great.
Dr. Sooriyaarachchi takes time to explain everything so you are able to understand. His PA Kaylee is awesome and a great listener.
William was very polite and patient and knew his job. Good guy.
reviews.owner_answer: A big thank you from our team for your 5-star review! We’re glad to have been part of your care.

reviews.review_text: My wife and I are snowbirds who fly south during the cold winter months up north.  We have been exceptionally pleased with our oncologist at FCS, Dr. Gregor Rodriguez, who has been our go-to physician for the last two years.  In addition to his exceptional knowledge in the field of oncology and hematology, his bedside manner is outstanding.  He is very friendly, kind and empathetic, while at the same time willing to take the time to answer our many questions and to clearly explain his recommended treatment approach, all this knowing he is only treating us for two months out of the year.  We would love for him to be our doctor back home.  We are very fortunate to have him here during our stay in Fort Myers.
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you so much for taking the time to leave us a review! We're thrilled to hear that your experience has been a positive one. We'll be sure to share your feedback with the team!

reviews.review_text: Dr. Khan is a very compassionate man.  He also explained the treatment and gave us opportunities to ask any questions.
SHOUT OUT and KUDOS TO DR. SOORI for his kindness, professionalism, honest and sincere care of my 87 year old Mom.  He always brings a smile to our faces! 💜
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you for sharing your positive experience with Dr. Soori. We're thrilled to hear about the kindness, professionalism, and sincere care your mom received. Your feedback is greatly appreciated. Thank you for entrusting her care to Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute.

reviews.review_text: Friendly, kind, caring, efficient, staff, physician and Nurse practitioner.  The care team took the time to explain everything and listen to my history and concerns.  Absolutely very positive experience all around.
Ted is a great communicator . He clearly explains status and plans. He is easy to understand and work with
All employees are kind and helpful!   I have nothing but praise!
reviews.owner_answer: We appreciate you taking the time to leave an online review. Your feedback helps us improve our services and provide top-quality care to our patients.

reviews.review_text: FROM THE OUTSTANDING CUSTOMER SERVICE AT THE DESK TO THE OTHER DEPARTMENT EMPLOYEES ARE THE BEST.  ALWAYS THERE TO HELP AND FOLLOW THROUGH ON ANY QUESTIONS.  A TOP NOTCH PLACE TO GET YOUR CANCER NEEDS TAKEN CARE OF.

reviews.owner_answer: We appreciate your 5-star review and the confidence it reflects. Thank you for allowing us to care for you.

reviews.review_text: My girlfriend was treated by Dr Saleh.  He gave her a medication that made her so sick that she couldn’t even walk without oxygen or breath! She died as a result of the drug! She didn’t have to die. She was doing everything by herself until she took the drug! She went way too fast.
Took my husband there. They were so friendly and timely.  Very thorough
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you for sharing your experience. We’re glad to hear our team was friendly, timely, and thorough during your visit, and we appreciate you taking the time to let us know.
Your 5-star review was truly appreciated. It’s our goal to offer care that’s both advanced and compassionate—we’re glad that came through.
We appreciate you taking the time to leave an online review. Your feedback helps us improve our services and provide top-quality care to our patients.

reviews.review_text: Fast. Very egficient
reviews.owner_answer: Thank you for sharing your feedback. We’re glad to hear your visit was fast and efficient, and we appreciate you taking the time to let us know.
